name: Breonna Clarvoe
ai_summary: Breonna Clarvoe has two years of experience working with children in classroom and lunchroom settings. She is located in Augusta, GA and available part-time Monday through Friday.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Brianna clairvaux. I have experience in working with kids, doing, like, substituting and lunch rooms and classrooms for about, I say, two years or so.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Augusta, Georgia, on Richmond Hill Road.
transcripts.q5: I'm currently looking for part-time, work on my schedule, I can work Monday through Friday. I'm about 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.
transcripts.q6: If he's ever conflict between two children, I always try to separate them. Put one on one side of the classroom and the other on the other side.
transcripts.q7: I will make a great kid teacher because I'm able to teach kids different things. I'm a fun person to learn with and to get along with, I love kids and I have one of my own, she's 4 years old
